_comment: Heritage / PANORAMA workflow — export one campaign of one site to
a Potree-ready LAS file. Replace site_id and the timestamp in the
Assumes a `heritage_scans(site_id int, campaigns tpcpatch)` table.

pipeline.query: SELECT (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM timestampN(s.campaigns, n)) * 1000000)::bigint AS t, valueN(s.campaigns, n) AS pcp, PC_PCId(valueN(s.campaigns, n)) AS pcid FROM heritage_scans s, generate_series(1, numInstants(s.campaigns)) n WHERE s.site_id = 42 AND timestampN(s.campaigns, n) = '2024-04-01'::timestamptz
